title: Grove - Screw Terminal
description: A passive adapter from a Grove cable to screw terminals.

# Grove - Screw Terminal

## Product Information

- SKU: 103020007
- Brand: Grove
- Manufacturer: Seeed Studio

## Specifications

| Item | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Connector | Grove 4-pin and screw terminal |
| Wire range | 16-30 AWG |

## Pin Definition

| Pin | Name | Function |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | GND | Ground |
| 2 | VCC | Supply |
| 3 | SIG1 | Signal one |
| 4 | SIG2 | Signal two |

## Getting Started

Disconnect power before tightening the terminals.
